title: euphrasia insignis var. makinoi
intro: Euphrasia insignis var. makinoi, also known as Makino's Eyebright, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia plant, a flowering plant native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Makino's Eyebright are thought to include the relief of eye and ear infections, as well as the improvement of symptoms associated with hay fever and other respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Makino's Eyebright is often used as a dried extract or in tea form to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
